header.title: Oriental Divination Systems
header.description: A mysterious discipline that unlocks the mysteries of the universe, rooted in the ancient Chinese I Ching (Book of Changes).

overview.title: Yidao Tang - A Hall of Yi Learning and Dao Cultivation
overview.description: Centered on the **I Ching** and Taoist philosophy, our website inherits and promotes traditional Chinese culture including Yi Learning, Feng Shui, numerology, Tai Chi and more. We uphold the essence of ancient classics, carry forward orthodox Yi Dao heritage, popularize professional knowledge of Yin-Yang and Five Elements, interpret the laws of nature and life, and dedicate ourselves to building a professional, authentic platform for the exchange and study of traditional Chinese culture and Yi studies.

systemsList.zhouyi: I Ching - foundation of all Chinese divination ✔️

zhouyi.name: Zhouyi Divination (I Ching Divination)
zhouyi.coreFeatures: Key features: Heaven-human unity, causality & holistic thinking; foundation for all other divination systems.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Deep philosophy & framework: Provides causal and holistic perspective for complex decisions.
Strong universality: Applicable to personal, organizational, and strategic levels.
Historical inheritance: Theoretical foundation for multiple divination systems.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Abstract symbols: Interpretation is subjective, requiring experience and context.
Limited time precision: Less accurate for specific timepoints or short-term events.
Complex line changes: High threshold for multiple-line interpretation.

liuyao.name: Liu Yao (Six-Line Divination)
liuyao.coreFeatures: Key features: Coins replace yarrow stalks; flexible & efficient; popular in folk tradition.
liuyao.positioning: Positioning: One event one divination, short-term precision, dynamic timeline prediction.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Highly targeted: Directly answers success/failure, fortune, and timepoints.
Rigorous system: Six relatives, six gods, month/day logic is clear.
Flexible casting: Coins / time / numbers method, usable anytime.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Limited to single events, difficult for lifetime overview.
Multiple line interpretations are complex, dependent on querent's focus.

meihua.name: Plum Blossom Divination
meihua.coreFeatures: Key features: Heart-mind oriented, opportunity-triggered, easy to master.
meihua.positioning: Positioning: Random casting, simple and fast temporary emergency divination method.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Extremely simple and flexible: Everything can be divined, instant hexagram casting.
Quick to learn: Basic symbolism enables quick fortune assessment.
Strong intuition: Suitable for quick judgment of sudden or random events.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Loose system framework with insufficient depth and detail.
Relies on intuition; stability and accuracy inferior to Liu Yao and Da Liu Ren.

bazi.name: Ba Zi (Four Pillars of Destiny)
bazi.coreFeatures: Key features: Life-climate model; emphasizes five-element harmony; destiny blueprint from birth time.
bazi.positioning: Positioning: Lifetime overview, personality traits, major cycles & annual fortune trends.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Holistic perspective: Reveals lifetime pattern, marriage, health, and major cycle trends.
High stability: Fixed birth time creates unique natal chart with long-term reference value.
Character analysis: Ten gods system enables deep personality & talent understanding.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Limited granularity: Biased toward major directions, difficult for small event details & precise timepoints.
Birth time dependency: Accuracy highly sensitive to birth time (errors >1 hour significantly impact readings).

zeri.name: Auspicious Date Selection (Zeri)
zeri.coreTool: Lunar/solar calendar, solar terms, sound/element verification, auspicious gods and inauspicious deities table
zeri.coreFeatures: Key features: Based on lunar/solar calendar, solar terms and querent's Ba Zi; prioritize auspicious gods, avoid clashing penalties; meticulous selection for specific dates and hours.
zeri.positioning: Positioning: Select auspicious dates and hours for marriages, moving, business opening, excavation, and burial.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Highly targeted: Directly selects the most suitable date and hour for specific activities.
Actionable strategy: Combined with Ba Zi and Feng Shui enables comprehensive preparation plan.
Risk mitigation: Avoid clashing penalties and inauspicious dates to minimize adverse effects.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Limited by available dates: Popular dates may be concentrated or unsuitable for all parties.
Requires extensive information (birth Ba Zi/location/purpose) with interpretation variations across schools.

ziwei.name: Zi Wei Dou Shu (Purple Star Astrology)
ziwei.coreFeatures: Key features: Rich star combinations; precise life-stage insights.
ziwei.positioning: Positioning: Star astrology, refined life and psychological insight for Oriental astrology.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Refined stars: Rich details on personality, six relatives, health, and wealth.
Strong visualization: 12-palace chart intuitive and easy to interpret.
Psychological insight: Excellent at analyzing subconscious and emotional structures.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Complex charting; multiple schools cause interpretation variations.
Weaker fate modification/layout compared to Qi Men; timing precision inferior to Liu Yao/Da Liu Ren.

qimen.name: Qi Men Dun Jia (Mysterious Gate Escaping Armor)
qimen.description: Nine stars, eight gates, three oddities, six ceremonials
qimen.coreTool: Nine stars, eight gates, three oddities, six ceremonials
qimen.coreFeatures: Key features: Time+space integrated system; strong operational/strategic capability.
qimen.positioning: Positioning: Time-space strategy, directional layout and strategic decision-making superior tool.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Can select auspicious time, choose auspicious direction, layout for fate reversal, resolve disasters.
Suitable for multi-person/multi-event global coordination and complex game analysis.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Complex system, high learning threshold, requires precise time for charting.
Difficult for beginners; abstract symbols unsuitable for trivial matters.

liuren.name: Da Liu Ren
liuren.description: Twelve heavenly generals, lunar month + time, heaven & earth boards
liuren.coreTool: Twelve heavenly generals, lunar month + time, heaven & earth boards
liuren.coreFeatures: Key features: Four-course/three-transmission, class-deity system; highly intricate and human-focused.
liuren.positioning: Positioning: King of human affairs; suitable for deep inference of complex interpersonal and event matters.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Ultimate refinement: See event cause-effect, human psychology and hidden factors clearly.
Strong human affair divination: Relationships, disputes, cooperation details extremely insightful.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Extremely difficult to learn; strict charting with complex symbols prone to errors.
Less flexible; primarily focuses on human affairs rather than Feng Shui layout.

taiyi.name: Tai Yi Divine Numbers
taiyi.coreFeatures: Key features: One of three schools, focuses on macroscopic events; used for national fortune and major trends.
taiyi.positioning: Positioning: National fortune and major trend macroscopic prediction.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Excellent at macroscopic forecasting: High accuracy in judging national, era and major event trends.
Strong cyclical and macro-trend analysis: Suitable for long-term strategy formulation and policy reference.
Combined history and celestial: Integrate calendar and celestial phenomena for overall trend.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Difficult to apply to personal affairs: Focuses on macro, unsuitable for refined personal event divination.
Rare system and high threshold: Limited schools and resources; very few practitioners.
Conceptual explanation: Requires combining other methods for concrete decision-making.

fengshui.name: Feng Shui
fengshui.coreFeatures: Key features: Adjust spatial energy to improve health/wealth/family; long-term environmental influence.
fengshui.positioning: Positioning: Environmental energy and spatial layout fate reversal tool applicable to Yang and Yin dwellings.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Strong fate reversal capability: Environmental adjustment produces sustained and significant effects.
High controllability: Layout, placement and direction actively adjustable for fortune improvement.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: High cost and timeline: Renovation, relocation costs and time commitment substantial.
Limited by structure, slow effect; many schools create variance.

xiang.name: Physiognomy (Xiang Xue)
xiang.coreTool: Face reading, palm reading, demeanor observation
xiang.coreFeatures: Key features: Infer destiny and character through observing physical features; systematic theory, cost-free, instantly applicable.
xiang.positioning: Positioning: Quick judgment tool for character insight and destiny trends; suitable for initial encounters and talent selection.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Zero cost and threshold: No payment required, observable anytime, low learning cost.
Instant judgment: Quickly assess temperament, character and fortune tendency upon first meeting.
Widely applicable: Useful for talent selection, romance, HR recruitment, character analysis and daily scenarios.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Limited precision: Observation results are trend judgments, unable to predict specific events accurately.
Strong subjectivity: Diverse theories and many schools create variance; influenced by observer experience.
Cannot reverse directional judgments: Results tend toward determinism; limited space for fate reversal.

sliuren.name: Sliuren (Small Liuren)
sliuren.coreFeatures: Key features: Simplified Liuren system, faster divination, folk tradition.
sliuren.positioning: Positioning: Quick divination, convenient inference tool commonly used in folk.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Fast speed: Faster charting than Da Liu Ren, suitable for emergency temporary use.
Easy to learn and apply: Basic rules relatively simple, widely circulated in folk traditions.
Strong targeting: Despite simplification, still maintains good accuracy for short-term events.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Insufficient depth: Detail inference not as precise as Da Liu Ren.
Limited application: Primarily for short-term events, difficult to encompass complex interpersonal matters.
School variations: Different regions and sects have inconsistent interpretation standards.

tieban.name: Tieban Divine Numbers
tieban.description: Mathematical algorithms, nine stars, eight trigrams
tieban.coreTool: Mathematical algorithms, nine stars, eight trigrams
tieban.coreFeatures: Key features: Precise mathematical divination, known for universal accuracy principle.
tieban.positioning: Positioning: Precise prediction and high-accuracy system of mathematical inference.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Extremely accurate application: Based on mathematical formulas, claims 'universal accuracy', very high precision.
Clear standards: Based on mathematical algorithms, eliminate subjective judgment, strong result certainty.
Broad application: Applicable to multiple aspects like fate, timing, fortune prediction.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Black box characteristic: Most formulas and algorithms are secret transmissions, difficult to understand thoroughly.
Learning difficulty: Complex system, scarce resources, very few inheritors.
Limited practicality: Though accurate, provides conclusions rather than analysis process, difficult to flexibly apply.

drawing.name: Drawing Lots
drawing.coreFeatures: Key features: Ceremonial, popular, readable; often used in temples.
drawing.positioning: Positioning: Prayer, group/temple ritual and short-term spiritual guidance.

advantages.title: Advantages
items: Easily accessible: Low threshold, public habituated participation, broad circulation.
Strongly ceremonial: Provides psychological comfort and ritual support, enhances confidence.
Quick response: Simple procedure, suitable for prayer and short-term guidance.

disadvantages.title: Disadvantages
items: Interpretation dependent: Lot text usually poems or symbols requiring diviner explanation, strong subjectivity.
Surface guidance: Usually provides vague or encouraging suggestions, lacks in-depth analysis.
Influenced by ritual and environment: Results and meaning may vary across different cultures/temples.

qimen_intro.title: Qi Men Dun Jia (Mysterious Gate Escaping Armor) Divination Rules
qimen_intro.intro: The Qi Men Dun Jia (Extraordinary Door Escape Technique) is an ancient Chinese system of divination and strategic planning that combines time and space for tactical decision-making.
elements: Based on 8 directions and 9 palaces (eight gates and nine sectors)
Uses 10 heavenly stems and 12 earthly branches (ten stems and twelve branches)
Calculates auspicious timing and favorable directions
Applied in strategic decision-making and tactical planning
qimen_intro.paiPan: Qi Men Dun Jia Chart Casting

ziwei_intro.title: Zi Wei Dou Shu (Purple Star Astrology)  Divination Rules
ziwei_intro.intro: The Zi Wei Dou Shu (Purple Star Astrology) is a sophisticated system based on astrology and numerology that analyzes personality traits, relationships, and life destiny through 12 palaces and 108 stars.
elements: Based on 14 major stars and 108 total stars
Uses 12 palaces system for life areas
Analyzes personality traits and destiny patterns
Predicts fortunes and life transitions
ziwei_intro.paiPan: Zi Wei Dou Shu Chart Casting

liuren_intro.title: Da Liu Ren (Great Six Stem Divination)  Divination Rules
liuren_intro.intro: The Da Liu Ren (Great Six Stem Divination) system uses a unique framework that is known as the 'King of Human Affairs' for its precision in analyzing complex interpersonal situations and events.
elements: Based on 12 heavenly generals and their interactions
Uses lunar month and time for calculations
Focused on timing cycles and class deity system
Popular for practical divination of human affairs

liuyao_intro.title: Liu Yao (Six Line Divination)  Divination Rules
liuyao_intro.intro: The Liu Yao (Six Line Divination) is based on the I Ching (Book of Changes) and uses six lines of divination, making it the most accessible form of I Ching divination for modern practitioners.
elements: Based on 6 lines system of yin and yang
Uses copper coins for casting the hexagrams
Primary and secondary hexagrams interpretation
Most accessible and popular I Ching divination method

bazi_intro.title: Ba Zi (Four Pillars of Destiny)  Divination Rules
bazi_intro.intro: The Ba Zi (Eight Characters or Four Pillars of Destiny) is based on birth date and time, providing a complete blueprint of a person's life destiny, personality, and major life cycles.
elements: Based on 8 characters (year, month, day, hour)
Uses heavenly stems and earthly branches (10 stems and 12 branches)
Analyzes personality traits and life path
Determines compatibility and fortune trends

name_intro.title: Name Study (Naming Science)  Divination Rules
name_intro.intro: Name Study is a traditional Chinese science of analyzing the significance and energy of personal names, combining stroke count, five elements theory, and numerology for optimal destiny influence.
elements: Stroke count analysis and numerology
Five elements correspondence to name characters
Name character energy interpretation
Five grid system analysis (strokes in name)
Auspicious character selection for names
Destiny and fortune assessment through naming

meihua_intro.title: Plum Blossom Divination Heart-Mind Method
meihua_intro.intro: The Plum Blossom Divination (Mei Hua Yi Shu) is an intuitive method of divination emphasizing the heart-mind as primary, allowing spontaneous and instant divination based on time, numbers, or directions.
elements: Time-based divination (year, month, day, hour)
Eight trigrams symbolic interpretation
Number and direction method for casting
Heart-mind primary principle for reading
Instant opportunity divination capability
Easy to master and apply in daily situations

fengshui_intro.title: Feng Shui Geomancy and Environmental Harmony
fengshui_intro.intro: Feng Shui (Fung Shui) is the ancient Chinese art of environmental design and geomancy for harmonizing human living spaces with natural energy flows and celestial influences.
elements: Landform and topography analysis
Qi (life force) flow and circulation principles
Five elements theory application and balance
Yin-yang balance optimization in spaces
Directional analysis and auspicious positioning
Space layout and furniture design for harmony

xiang_intro.title: Physiognomy (Face and Hand Reading) Divination Rules
xiang_intro.intro: Physiognomy (Xiang Xue) is a traditional Chinese discipline that predicts life destiny, personality traits, and future development by observing external human features.
elements: Face reading overview (three sections, five eyes, face shapes)
Detailed facial features analysis (eyebrows, eyes, nose, mouth, ears significance)
Facial region analysis (forehead, under-eyes, cheekbones, chin)
Hand reading fundamentals (five palm regions, hand shapes, palm color)
Palm lines interpretation (life line, heart line, head line, fate line)
Comprehensive analysis methods (temperament observation, detailed analysis, destiny prediction)

taiyi_intro.title: Tai Yi Divine Numbers Macroscopic Divination
taiyi_intro.intro: Tai Yi Divine Numbers (Tai Yi Shen Shu) is one of the three major divination systems in Chinese metaphysics, focusing on macroscopic events, national fortune, and major trend predictions.
elements: Nine palaces system for prediction
Tai Yi chronology and astronomical calculations
Five elements progression and balance theory
Macroscopic trend analysis methodology
National fortune and era forecasting
One of the three schools of divination (San Shi)
taiyi_intro.paiPan: Tai Yi Divine Numbers Chart Casting

sliuren_intro.title: Small Liu Ren Quick Divination Method
sliuren_intro.intro: Small Liu Ren (Xiao Liu Ren) is a simplified and faster divination method derived from the Da Liu Ren system, emphasizing speed and accessibility for immediate practical use.
elements: Three courses system (month, day, hour)
Six symbols methodology and analysis
Quick inference techniques and formulas
Folk tradition and widespread usage in communities
Short-term event prediction capability
Simplified Liu Ren approach for practical use

tieban_intro.title: Tieban Divine Numbers Mathematical Divination
tieban_intro.intro: Tieban Divine Numbers (Tie Ban Shen Shu) is a precise mathematical divination system known for its universal accuracy principle in predictions, combining mathematical formulas with traditional divination methods.
elements: Mathematical algorithms and secret formulas
Nine star positioning and interaction system
Eight trigram combinations and sequences
Precise mathematical calculations and proofs
Universal accuracy principle in predictions
Deterministic and systematic prediction methodology

drawing_intro.title: Drawing Lots Temple Divination
drawing_intro.intro: Drawing Lots (Chou Qian) is a traditional ritual divination method combining prayer, ceremony, and spiritual wisdom, commonly practiced in temples and spiritual spaces throughout the Chinese world.
elements: Sacred ritual and ceremonial process
Sign container with numbered bamboo sticks
Poetic or proverb-based interpretive text
Temple authority and spiritual legitimacy
Psychological comfort and spiritual guidance
Cultural heritage and folkloric significance

zhouyi_intro.title: Zhouyi / I Ching Book of Changes
zhouyi_intro.intro: The Zhouyi (Book of Changes) or I Ching is the foundational philosophical and divination system underlying all Chinese metaphysics, wisdom traditions, and divination methods.
elements: Based on 8 trigrams and 64 hexagrams (gua)
Yin and yang duality principles and dynamics
Line changes and transformations interpretation
Heaven-human unity cosmic philosophy
Foundation for all other divination systems
Applicable to general decisions and life guidance
